payload.query: There are two dominant models of democratization - modernization and distributive approaches. First, summarize and critique the most important elements of each approach, focusing on assumptions, hypotheses, and democratic outcomes. Then, contrast their arguments with other theories about democratization where appropriate. In your view, is one or the other more useful? Is it possible to attempt to combine these approaches?
